◎简　　介  

　　After a story of Tamara Tinberg, "Seventh Symphony". The Leningrad block. February 1942. Ends the worst blockade winter. Nina Voronova completely desperate. Her three-year-old son, Mitya, has weakened, and the ration cards have already been delivered two qigou.cc days in advance. Last hope - evacuation. But with small children do not take.
